Video.summary: After years of ups and downs, the result of a DNA test will make or break a long-distance relationship.
Video.title: Webb vs. Jackson

Video.summary: Demario and Necole’s relationship is tested when he tries to impose his conservative Christian values onto her.
Video.title: Scott vs. Thomas

Video.summary: Angela is prepared to call off her wedding if her fiancée, Juan, proves to have been unfaithful.
Video.title: Martinez vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: Jessica demands accountability and honesty from Brandon to rebuild trust and secure their family's future amid unresolved conflicts.
Video.title: Williams vs. Williams

Video.summary: Imani and LaBron face a high-stakes compatibility test to determine if their love and family can survive.
Video.title: Gordon vs. Watson

Video.summary: It's music biz mayhem when two men tangle over their boy band. Was it a record label rip off?
Video.title: The Reunion of Swag Kids

Video.summary: Felicia is done playing sugar mama for her younger boyfriend, Tyler: she wants the money she's owed for his repossessed truck.
Video.title: Mallett vs. Silas

Video.summary: Laura is suing her ex-friend and workmate for a loan. Caylee says Laura offered money without any obligations!
Video.title: The Devil's in the Details

Video.summary: Amanda is suing her ex-best friend Bernardo for thousands spent on bail money to hair care.
Video.title: Ya Booze Ya Lose

Video.summary: Secrets, suspicions and a paternity test collide as a strained couple battle for truth and trust in court.
Video.title: Moore vs. Ariza

Video.summary: An entertainer seeks help from the judges on how to deal with his girlfriend’s insecurity surrounding his line of work.
Video.title: Obiowo vs. Vranas

Video.summary: Shaylen petitions her boyfriend, Quan, to take a polygraph test because she suspects he's cheating with his ex.
Video.title: Thomas vs. Hudson

Video.summary: A haunted doll and accusations of witchcraft have a formerly married couple standing in front of the judges.
Video.title: Smith vs. Johnston

Video.summary: Judy is suing her niece for 12 months of unpaid rent. Cassandra says there was never a deal to pay any rent.
Video.title: Unconditional Rent

Video.summary: Comedian Allan Cunningham is suing his former fan for the money she owes him for a private party.
Video.title: Heckling the Plaintiff

Video.summary: Kimberly Arson claims that her cousin skipped out on rent to spend it on gambling money, cars and wigs. Charmel says the rent deal changed the day she became Kimberly's glorified nanny.
Video.title: My Freeloading Cousin Is Wigging Out!

Image.alt: My Freeloading Cousin Is Wigging Out!
My Freeloading Cousin Is Wigging Out!
My Freeloading Cousin Is Wigging Out!

Video.summary: Shakeila is ready to marry Kelvin, hoping their trust issues and 15-year age gap won't keep her single.
Video.title: Evans vs. Watson

Video.summary: Corina broke up with Anthony after choking her but after finding out she's pregnant, sues for child support.
Video.title: Get It On Record

Video.summary: High school sweethearts Darionna and Elijah seek help from the judges after getting a bitter taste of the struggles in marriage.
Video.title: Truell vs. Truell

Video.summary: When the Cowans find they’re growing apart after 10 years of marriage, they come before the judges for help.
Video.title: Cowan vs Cowan

Video.summary: With help from a substance abuse expert, the judges coach Nohariz and Eli through marital issues and alcohol abuse.
Video.title: Gonzalez vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: A Georgia man questions if his girlfriend’s late night “work calls” mean she’s escorting again. A polygraph test will reveal all.
Video.title: Ubani vs. Green

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating mixed with short tempers is a recipe for disaster in D’Mitry and Jessica’s relationship.
Video.title: Hartfield vs. Saunders

Video.summary: Michael Jackson impersonator Jack accuses girlfriend Amanda of property damage.
Video.title: Perez vs. McBride

Video.summary: Since the birth of their child, Canandas denies being the father, so Charisma demands he take a paternity test.
Video.title: Paige vs Ware

Video.summary: A man says his girlfriend's actions don't match her words, which makes him suspect that she's cheating on him.
Video.title: Jackson vs. King

Video.summary: A devastating revelation proves that love truly is blind in Sharise and Edson's relationship.
Video.title: Bowie vs. Segarra

Video.summary: Accusations of betrayal threaten their future as Christopher and Michelle seek to determine the fate of their family and home.
Video.title: Gore vs. Sherman

Video.summary: A boyfriend and girlfriend go head-to-head in court over a discarded promise ring and a broken camera.
Video.title: White vs. Mitchell

Video.summary: The mysterious disappearance of a prized Steelers jersey has Michelle and Ken's 23-year relationship on the line.
Video.title: Lozon vs. Lozon

Video.summary: Were they loans? Was she funding her gambling boyfriend in order to rake in the profit?
Video.title: Going for Broke

Video.summary: Is James splitting hairs with Carle over his bad hair day or is there just a hair more about this case?
Video.title: Splitting Hairs

Video.summary: Michael, a clown and Elvis Presley impersonator, is suing his talent agent for unpaid dues.
Video.title: Bonzo and the Hound Dog

Video.summary: Sean Amey is suing his former roommates for his security deposit after being forced out of the apartment through calculated scheming. The roommates admit to lying but say that he deserved it.
Video.title: Rowdy Roommate Ruckus

Video.summary: A woman crashed her sister's car during a snowstorm, and her sister wants payment.
Video.title: Hey Sis! You Trashed My Car and Trashed Our Bond!

Image.alt: Hey Sis! You Trashed My Car and Trashed Our Bond!
Hey Sis! You Trashed My Car and Trashed Our Bond!
Hey Sis! You Trashed My Car and Trashed Our Bond!

Video.summary: A baby mama and grandma clash over who fathered the baby boy!
Video.title: Baby Mama Drama

Video.summary: Destiny is suing ex-roomate Bisa for unpaid rent. Bisa is counter suing for moving fees and mental anguish.
Video.title: Too Close for Comfort

Video.summary: Did their office friendship go too far? Are her misconduct claims a cover for the money she owes?
Video.title: Gross Misconduct

Video.summary: Shaneequa loved her precious pooch but when she could no longer care for her she found a friend that could.
Video.title: Screwing the Pooch

Video.summary: Nicole is suing the landlord for making her uncomfortable and changing the locks after a fight.
Video.title: Landlord Litigation

Video.summary: Karen McMillan says she went to pick up a lunch order for her office workers, and parked her car, and had to kill about 15 minutes before her order was ready. She walked over to a department store, and when she came out, her truck was gone because the defendant towed it. Ivan Cortez says the plaintiff parked her car at the restaurant and then walked next door to the mall. There are 35 signs stating you can’t do that. He says he owes her nothing because what she did was illegal. He’s accused of a tacky tow.
Video.title: Tacky Tow

Video.summary: Quadaisa Nelson sues Marlow White for $1,167.87, claiming he stole the iPhone and laptop he gifted her after an argument. Marlow, who raised her since she was four, says he reclaimed the gifts due to disrespect.
Video.title: A Family Fall Out

Video.summary: Frank sues his daughter Patricia, claiming she pocketed $2,010 in insurance money after a car accident. Patricia says the car was a gift, she paid insurance, and blames his new partner for turning him against her.
Video.title: Father/Daughter Crisis

Video.summary: Gloria McPherson sues photographer Aston Watson for $600, claiming he botched her wedding by failing to deliver on services, including a second photographer and an album. Aston defends, blaming her behavior and even her guests' looks.
Video.title: Wedding Photo Fiasco

Video.summary: After Vera's son was murdered in 2014, she learned that Alstin may be her grandson, and wants a DNA test.
Video.title: Seeking Her Grandson

Video.summary: The plaintiff says that, two years ago, her mother confessed that the defendant may be her biological father, so she has petitioned the court for a paternity test.
Video.title: Are You My Father?

Video.summary: Anastasia is a hair stylist here to sue one of her clients for an unpaid loan and emotional distress.
Video.title: Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan

Image.alt: Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan
Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan
Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan

Video.summary: Jorge brings his wife to court for damaged property after constantly accusing him of cheating.
Video.title: Done with the Accusations

Video.summary: Linda claims her daughter is lying about her being a bad mother, so she's suing for defamation.
Video.title: A Daughter Trying to Break a ‘Generational Curse’

Image.alt: A Daughter Trying to Break a ‘Generational Curse’
A Daughter Trying to Break a ‘Generational Curse’
A Daughter Trying to Break a ‘Generational Curse’

Video.summary: A mother claims her son punched her in the face three times after getting into an argument and then put her in a choke hold; her son claims he was only acting in self-defense.
Video.title: Punch Happy

Video.summary: McKenzie is suing her baby's father for the price of a car because he chooses work and football over family.
Video.title: Football Over Family
